title: Graduate School of Sciences Social Contribution
content:
Graduate School of Sciences Social Contribution

At Üsküdar University, we regard using our academic knowledge and experience for the advancement of society as a fundamental mission.

Within the scope of Social Contribution activities, various social projects, volunteer work, training programs, and other initiatives for the benefit of society are carried out together with our students, academics, and staff. These efforts enable our university to build strong connections with society both locally and globally.

In order to coordinate and manage these activities, the Social Contribution Coordination Office has been established within Üsküdar University. The office plays a central role in the planning, implementation, and reporting of social contribution projects, effectively putting into practice our university’s vision of social responsibility.

For more detailed information about our university’s social contribution activities and current projects, you may visit the relevant page on the Üsküdar University Social Contribution Coordination Office website.

https://toplumsalkatki.uskudaruniversitesi.edu.tr/
